fields.name: assessment_date
fields.description: Date the assessment was completed.

fields.name: vendor_name
fields.description: Legal or operating name of the vendor.

fields.name: vendor_service_description
fields.description: Description of products or services provided.

fields.name: business_owner
fields.description: Internal owner or relationship manager.

fields.name: criticality_tier
fields.description: Critical, high, medium, low, or other tier.

fields.name: inherent_risk_rating
fields.description: Inherent risk before controls.

fields.name: residual_risk_rating
fields.description: Residual risk after controls.

fields.name: data_access_level
fields.description: Customer data, confidential data, payment data, PHI, none, or other.

fields.name: customer_impact
fields.description: Whether vendor failure could materially affect customers.

fields.name: outsourcing_indicator
fields.description: Whether this is an outsourcing or material service provider.

fields.name: subcontractors
fields.description: Named material subcontractors or fourth parties.

fields.name: soc_report_type
fields.description: SOC 1, SOC 2, bridge letter, none, or other.

fields.name: soc_report_date
fields.description: Date or period end of SOC report.

fields.name: information_security_rating
fields.description: Information security control rating.

fields.name: business_continuity_rating
fields.description: BCP/DR control rating.

fields.name: financial_condition_rating
fields.description: Financial strength or viability rating.

fields.name: regulatory_compliance_rating
fields.description: Compliance control rating.

fields.name: open_issues
fields.description: Open issues, findings, or remediation items.

fields.name: remediation_due_date
fields.description: Due date for remediation if stated.

fields.name: approval_status
fields.description: Approved, conditionally approved, rejected, pending, or other.

fields.name: approver_name
fields.description: Approver, committee, or risk officer.

fields.name: next_review_date
fields.description: Next periodic review date.

completeness_checklist.description: All required fields are present or explicitly null with low confidence when absent.
Each declared section was reviewed for extractable evidence.
Object array fields use their item_schema for consistent nested extraction.
